name: tooluniverse
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for ToolUniverse scientific MCP workflows.

interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin that wraps the existing ToolUniverse MCP runtime while keeping the Claude MCPB release path separate.
defaultPrompt: Use ToolUniverse to find the right scientific database tool for my question.
Use ToolUniverse to search literature and summarize the evidence.
Use ToolUniverse to inspect available biomedical tools before execution.
